title: Scissors
description: Adds scissors to minecraft as a weapon!
body:
# This texturepack requires CIT Resewn!

A fun silly little texture pack that adds scissors as a weapon. Just rename any sword to "_Scissors_" and the item model will change to scissors! make sure the item is handled safely!

Made by Quayru

![scissors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e4826d94aba768e60c926dbc6f65280d3e322a1_0.webp)
